title: Shield Delay Indicator
description: Simplifies Shield PVP by making Shield Delay easier to understand.
body:
# **Shield Delay Indicator** is now released! 



**Shield Delay Indicator** PVP Mod intends to address a big issue: shielding. With this mod, you can now effectively train your shielding and improve effortlessly.

This mod has several key features:

HUD Shield Delay Indicator (Shows your own shield delay!)

Overhead Shield Delay Indicator (Shows other player's shield delay!)

Shield Delay Audio (Makes a noise to tell you when you're shielding.)

Bar Color Changer / Gradient Changer

Base Delay Changer to compensate for servers changing shield delay timing.

Audio Offset to increase chances of reacting.

You can change positioning, different audios, sizes, and more. 
Default Keybinds:

K - Open Config Menu / HUD

N - Debug Nameplate Bars

U - Test Audio

H - Toggle HUD Bar

This mod is quite new and is accepting suggestions! Please give me any suggestions you have in the discord: https://discord.gg/9vnAwqvRj6
